highLevelPlan: Analyze and fix the 400 Bad Request error and image preload warnings.
Describe a user interface for displaying blog content that renders markdown, combining terminal and modern text editor aesthetics.
Implement the blog content display UI as a modal component.
Debug errors related to remark-prism.js and global object in client-side code.

task-001-debug-blog-error.description_summary: Analyzed and fixed backend path issue for 400 Bad Request; frontend parameter still null.

task-002-debug-filename-param.description_summary: Debug why fileName parameter is null in MacToolbar.tsx.

task-003-debug-blog-content-400.description_summary: Debug the 400 Bad Request error from /api/blog-content when fileName is provided.

task-004-debug-blog-content-api-error.description_summary: Initial debugging complete. Issue likely related to Astro configuration or network environment, not backend code logic for query parameters.

task-005-investigate-astro-config.description_summary: Investigation complete. Issue likely an Astro bug with query parameter handling in development server. Suggested workarounds or monitoring Astro repo.

task-006-implement-dynamic-route.description_summary: Implemented dynamic route segment workaround for /api/blog-content and updated tests.

task-007-describe-blog-ui.description_summary: Describe a user interface for displaying blog content that renders markdown, combining terminal and modern text editor aesthetics.

task-008-implement-blog-ui-component.description_summary: Implement the blog content display UI as a modal component that appears when a blog title is clicked.

task-009-debug-blog-ui-errors.description_summary: Debug errors related to remark-prism.js and global object when displaying blog content in the modal component.
